title: Wadhwa Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Wadhwa Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
